---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to crawling, scoring, desktop UX, or operator workflow
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Goal

What problem should this solve.

## Why it matters

Explain the operator or product value.

## Proposed change

Describe the change as concretely as possible.

## Constraints

Anything this must not break:

- freshness
- source stability
- recommendation quality
- desktop usability
